zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡上行蓄势突破
zh.content:
P1：短期价格在67.3-67.9区间窄幅震荡，整体结构偏多，低点逐步抬高显示买盘仍占优，但上方67.9构成短线压力，突破前仍以整理为主。

P2：SMA20位于67.076，价格站上均线，短期偏强结构延续。MACD柱体为0.2194，动能温和扩张，显示多头优势但缺乏加速。

P3：支撑位关注67.35及67.0一带，上方阻力67.9与68.5构成分层压力。若跌破支撑则短线转弱，反之仍保持上行通道。

P4：操作上建议关注67.9突破信号，放量站稳可看向68.5-69区间。若多次受阻回落，可考虑高抛低吸并严格控制止损在67.3下方。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is consolidating in a narrow intraday range near 67.85 after a modest upward drift, with price holding just above the 20-period SMA at 67.076. This positioning reflects a short-term bullish bias, although momentum remains limited and lacks strong expansion. Market structure suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers, with no confirmed breakout yet. Sustained closes above 67.5 continue to support a constructive outlook overall in the near term bias intact.

MACD is printing a positive reading of 0.2194, indicating underlying bullish momentum despite the absence of a full signal-line crossover confirmation. This suggests early-stage strength rather than mature trend acceleration. The proximity to the 20-SMA reinforces a supportive technical base, while subdued volatility points to price compression. Traders should monitor whether momentum expands or fades as price approaches nearby resistance levels and psychological barriers ahead in the short term view.

Immediate support is seen at 67.35, with stronger backing near the 20-SMA around 67.07, which acts as a dynamic support zone. On the upside, resistance forms at 67.90, followed by a psychological barrier at 68.50 and extended resistance near 69.50. Price compression between these levels suggests a breakout-driven move is likely, with volatility expansion expected once direction is confirmed in either direction in the near future market context unfolding dynamics.

Given the current structure, a neutral-to-bullish stance is favored while price holds above the 20-SMA. Aggressive traders may consider continuation entries on a break above 67.90 with volume confirmation, targeting 68.50 and 69.50. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for a retest of 67.07 support. Risk management is essential, with protective stops placed below 66.80 to mitigate downside volatility risk exposure in uncertain conditions near-term outlook remains flexible and adaptive stance.
